landing.title: Manage your olive farm with trustworthy AI insights
landing.body: AgroVision Olive combines harvest timing, disease scanning, and production forecasting in one professional dashboard.
landing.showcaseTitle: One connected workflow for farm intelligence
landing.howItWorksTitle: From setup to action in three clear steps
landing.benefitHarvest: Estimate harvest readiness using image evidence, cultivar context, weather, and season logic.
landing.benefitDisease: Use plant-part routing and symptom evidence to avoid reckless diagnoses.
landing.benefitProduction: Project next-season production with a range and clear drivers.
landing.benefitAssistant: Get practical weekly guidance for actions and alerts.
landing.step1Body: Set location, cultivar, and orchard groups once.
landing.step2Body: Run harvest and disease workflows with guided quality checks.
landing.step3Body: Use the outputs to plan harvest, monitoring, and treatment.
landing.showcaseDashboardBody: Track farm health, harvest readiness, disease alerts, and production outlook in one place.
landing.showcaseOrchardBody: Visualize season, weather, and maturity context with an elegant dynamic orchard preview.
landing.showcaseWeatherBody: Use climate context to refine timing recommendations and seasonal planning decisions.
landing.trustBody: AgroVision Olive prioritizes dependable guidance, clear confidence levels, and practical next actions over overconfident guesses.

dashboard.addNewFarmDesc: Create a new profile and configure the orchard
dashboard.openAlerts: Open alerts in the latest scans
dashboard.diseaseQuickAction: Upload leaf photos for symptom-based disease guidance.
dashboard.harvestQuickAction: Estimate maturity and optimal harvesting windows.
dashboard.noFarmDashboardDesc: Add your farm profile to unlock harvest, disease, and production intelligence.
dashboard.noScansHint: No scans yet - start with Harvest Time or Disease Scan.
dashboard.productionQuickAction: Project next season yield with confidence-aware ranges.
dashboard.noProductionForecastYet: No production forecast has been saved yet.
dashboard.runProductionModelHint: Run the production module to show an estimated range here.

diseaseScan.title: Disease Scan
diseaseScan.subtitle: Upload close-up leaf images. The system prioritizes reliability and avoids reckless diagnoses.
diseaseScan.uploadDesc: Upload up to 3 close-up images. Strong symptoms improve precision.
diseaseScan.orchardInsightDesc: We keep outputs short, practical, and confidence-aware.
diseaseScan.tryCloserShot: Image unclear - try a closer shot
diseaseScan.uploadPrompt: Drag and drop or click to upload
diseaseScan.noScansDesc: Upload a leaf photo to start symptom analysis.
diseaseScan.analysisFailed: Disease analysis failed for this image.
diseaseScan.defaultTreatment: Recommended management approach: use locally approved products and confirm dosage with local guidance.
diseaseScan.followManagement: Follow the recommended management approach and rescan in 7 days.
diseaseScan.leafPipelineTip: The leaf pipeline is strongest today; fruit and branch remain conservative until dataset coverage improves.
diseaseScan.reviewUploadClearer: Needs review. Upload clearer symptom close-ups from 2 to 3 trees.
diseaseScan.startWithClearImage: Upload one clear image to start.
diseaseScan.uncertainTreatment: Diagnosis uncertain. Avoid treatment until a clearer scan is confirmed.
diseaseScan.uploadHint: Drag & drop clear close-ups (natural light, visible symptoms)

reasons.quality_image_closer: Upload a clearer close-up image with proper lighting and visible symptom area.
reasons.part_unclear: Plant part is unclear. The image cannot be routed reliably to a disease model.
reasons.fruit_conservative: Fruit disease prediction is conservative until this part-specific dataset is stronger.
reasons.branch_conservative: Branch disease prediction is conservative until this part-specific dataset is stronger.
reasons.conflict_visible_evidence: Visible symptom evidence conflicts with a healthy or no-symptom output.
reasons.no_strong_pattern: No strong disease pattern is visible in this leaf image.
reasons.weak_lesion_evidence: Leaf is visible but clear lesion evidence is weak.
reasons.not_enough_leaf_evidence: Leaf evidence is not strong enough for a reliable diagnosis from this image.
reasons.consistent_leaf_model: Leaf symptoms and model evidence are consistent for this diagnosis.
reasons.routing_conflict: Plant-part routing is conflicting; the leaf diagnosis is not reliable enough from this image.

actions.retake_closeup: Re-take one clear close-up of a leaf, fruit, or branch.
actions.upload_leaf_closeup: Upload a leaf close-up for reliable disease diagnosis, or proceed with agronomist review.
actions.upload_second_angle: Upload another close-up from the affected area and a second angle.
actions.monitor_rescan: Continue monitoring and rescan in 7 days or when symptoms appear.
actions.capture_if_new_spots: Capture another close-up if new spots appear; otherwise continue routine monitoring.
actions.upload_clear_closeup: Upload another clear close-up from an affected area and a second angle.
actions.apply_management: Apply recommended management and rescan in 5-7 days.
actions.upload_leaf_or_review: Upload a clear close-up of one olive leaf. If the symptom involves an insect or another plant part, request agronomist review.

harvestTime.title: Harvest Time
harvestTime.subtitle: Maturity analysis based on image, season, and weather
harvestTime.estimatorDesc: Image + metadata + climate context. Outputs are confidence-aware and field-friendly.
harvestTime.calendarDesc: Color-coded timing checkpoints for field planning.
harvestTime.guideMessage: Upload one clear olive photo to estimate maturity, readiness, and practical harvest timing.
harvestTime.guideTip: A close on-tree fruit photo gives the best reliability.
harvestTime.harvestContextDesc: Weather and season context used in this estimate.
harvestTime.irrigationPlaceholder: e.g., deficit irrigation, dry soil, heavy irrigation
harvestTime.uploadHint: Close fruit photo with visible olives

productionModel.title: Production Model
productionModel.subtitle: Yield forecast for the next season

assumptions.rainfall_unavailable: Rainfall context unavailable; neutral rainfall assumption used.
assumptions.heat_unavailable: Heat stress context unavailable; neutral heat assumption used.
assumptions.cultivar_unavailable: Cultivar suitability not confirmed; neutral cultivar score used.
assumptions.irrigation_unavailable: Irrigation data not provided; neutral irrigation assumption used.
assumptions.disease_unavailable: Disease history unavailable; neutral disease pressure score used.
assumptions.age_unavailable: Tree age data unavailable; neutral age score used.

productionModel.automaticScoresDesc: Automatic score derivation from farm and weather data with optional manual overrides.
productionModel.chartToggleDesc: Toggle between this-year baseline and projected next season view.
productionModel.driverFilterDesc: Filter supportive vs constraining factors affecting next season output.
productionModel.enterHistoryValues: Enter at least last year and two-years-ago production values.
productionModel.guideMessage: Estimate next season olive production with farm history, climate, cultivar, irrigation, disease pressure, and tree age.
productionModel.guideTip: This is a forecast range for planning, not a guaranteed exact output.
productionModel.onlyTwoYears: Only 2 years of production history available; simplified forecast formula applied.
productionModel.savedMessage: Production forecast saved to farm history.

recommendations.stable: Use this range for labor and processing planning, and update monthly with weather and disease changes.
recommendations.down: Yield outlook is constrained. Prioritize irrigation consistency, disease pressure control, and stress mitigation.
recommendations.up: Yield outlook is favorable. Plan logistics early and protect canopy and fruit health to preserve potential.
recommendations.low_confidence: Forecast confidence is limited. Add missing data (irrigation, tree age, or additional history) before major commitments.

assistant.title: AgroVision Assistant
assistant.welcome: I can summarize orchard status, flag risks, and suggest useful next steps.
assistant.emptyStateDesc: Choose a quick action or ask a question. Answers stay short and practical.
assistant.guideMessage: Ask farm questions and get concise, practical guidance linked to harvest, disease, and production workflows.
assistant.guideTip: Use quick actions for faster navigation during field operations.
assistant.noScansMessage: No scans yet. Start with a harvest or disease scan to populate the dashboard.

farmSetup.title: Farm Setup
farmSetup.wizardDesc: Configure the profile, map location, and tree groups in guided steps.
farmSetup.pickCityOrMap: Pick a city preset or click the map to set exact coordinates.
farmSetup.fillRequired: Fill owner name, farm name, and total trees.
farmSetup.addValidGroup: Add at least one valid tree group.
farmSetup.geolocationUnsupported: Geolocation is not available in this browser.
farmSetup.geolocationApplied: Current location applied. You can move the point if needed.
farmSetup.geolocationDenied: Permission denied. Select the position on the map.
farmSetup.geolocationFailed: Unable to get the current location. Select the position on the map.

auth.signInSubtitle: Access your dashboard, harvest insights, and disease monitoring in one workspace.
auth.signUpSubtitle: Set up secure access to your orchard workspace and verify your email.
auth.verifySubtitle: Enter the 6-digit code sent to {{email}} to activate your account.
auth.passwordMin6: Password must contain at least 6 characters.
auth.passwordMin8: Use at least 8 characters for your password.
auth.verificationUnavailable: Verification code is unavailable. Please resend code.
auth.incorrectCode: Incorrect code. Check your email and try again.
auth.newCodeSent: A new verification code has been sent.

common.dragAndDropImage: Drag and drop image files here
common.backendUnavailable: Cannot reach the backend API. Check the configured API URL or start the backend and retry.

oliveDetect.description: Upload one or more orchard photos. For stronger coverage, use up to 3 photos from different trees.
oliveDetect.message: Count olives from orchard photos and keep yield tracking consistent.
oliveDetect.preliminaryOneImage: Preliminary: one image only. Add 2 more images for a stronger estimate.
oliveDetect.tip: Use multiple angles for better coverage across trees.
oliveDetect.title: Olive Detect
oliveDetect.uploadHint: Drag and drop clear orchard images
oliveDetect.nextActionUploadClearer: Upload clearer photos with visible olives.
oliveDetect.nextActionAddMore: Add more photos from different trees for better farm coverage.
oliveDetect.nextActionMonitorWeekly: Use count as an observational estimate and monitor weekly.

orchard.autumnGuidance: Track ripening and prepare labor for harvest window.
orchard.springGuidance: Monitor flowering and support healthy new growth.
orchard.summerGuidance: Watch water stress and fruit development closely.
orchard.winterGuidance: Focus on pruning, sanitation, and orchard maintenance.
